title: Paphiopedilum paulistanum
taxonomy: Paphiopedilum paulistanum is a species of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the genus Paphiopedilum. This genus is part of the larger family Orchidaceae, which comprises over 30,000 species of orchids. Paphiopedilum paulistanum is native to Brazil and is a relatively rare species. The classification of this plant is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the order Asparagales.
